customSqlQuery:
SELECT
  {col:event_id} as event_id,
  {col:event_type} as event_type,
  {col:event_name} as event_name,
  {col:app_version} as app_version,
  {col:application_id} as application_id,
  date({epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_date,
  date_trunc('hour', {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_hour,
  NULLIF({json:platform}, '') as platform,
  CASE NULLIF({json:country_id}, '')
    WHEN 'UK' THEN 'United Kingdom'
    ELSE {initcap:country_id}
  END as country,
  1 as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events

SELECT
  {col:event_id} as event_id,
  {col:event_type} as event_type,
  date({epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_date,
  {json:match_id} as match_id,
  NULLIF({json:map_id}, '') as map_id,
  NULLIF({json:match_type}, '') as match_type,
  NULLIF({json:match_result_type}, '') as match_result,
  NULLIF({json:spell_id}, '') as spell_used,
  CAST(NULLIF({json:exp_gained}, '') AS INTEGER) as exp_gained,
  NULLIF({json:matching_failed_msg}, '') AS matching_failed_msg,
  NULLIF({json:most_used_spell}, '') AS most_used_spell,
  1 as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} IN ('match_start', 'match_end', 'user_knockout', 'matchmaking_start', 'matchmaking_complete', 'matchmaking_failed')
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}

SELECT
  {col:event_id} as event_id,
  {col:event_type} as event_type,
  date({epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_date,
  {json:level_id} as level_id,
  CAST({json:level_version} AS INTEGER) as level_version,
  1 as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} IN ('level_started', 'level_completed', 'level_failed')
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}

SELECT
  {col:event_id} as event_id,
  {col:event_type} as event_type,
  date({epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_date,
  NULLIF({json:item_id}, '') as item_id,
  CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) as currency_amount,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1 AND 9 THEN '01: $1-9'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN '02: $10-19'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 20 AND 49 THEN '03: $20-49'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 50 AND 99 THEN '04: $50-99'
    WHEN CAST(NULLIF({json:currency_amount}, '') AS INTEGER) >= 100 THEN '05: $100+'
    ELSE '99: Unknown'
  END as currency_amount_band,
  NULLIF({json:currency_type}, '') as currency_type,
  NULLIF({json:transaction_id}, '') as transaction_id,
  NULLIF({json:item_rarity}, '') as item_rarity,
  CAST(NULLIF({json:lootbox_cost}, '') AS INTEGER) as lootbox_cost,
  1 as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} IN ('iap_transaction', 'lootbox_opened', 'item_viewed')
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}

SELECT
  {col:event_id} as event_id,
  {col:event_type} as event_type,
  {col:app_version} as app_version,
  date({epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp}) as event_date,
  CASE NULLIF({json:country_id}, '')
    WHEN 'UK' THEN 'United Kingdom'
    ELSE {initcap:country_id}
  END as country,
  NULLIF({json:platform}, '') as platform,
  NULLIF({json:report_reason}, '') as report_reason,
  CAST(NULLIF({json:user_rating}, '') AS INTEGER) as user_rating,
  NULLIF({json:user_rank_reached}, '') as rank_reached,
  NULLIF({json:tutorial_screen_id}, '') AS tutorial_screen_id,
  1 as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} IN ('user_registration', 'user_report', 'user_sentiment', 'user_rank_up', 'tutorial_progression')
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}

SELECT '1_matchmaking_start' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} = 'matchmaking_start'
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}
UNION ALL
SELECT '2_matchmaking_complete' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} = 'matchmaking_complete'
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}
UNION ALL
SELECT '3_match_start' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} = 'match_start'
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}
UNION ALL
SELECT '4_match_end' as stage_label, count(*) as event_count
FROM {db_name}."event_data" events
WHERE {col:event_type} = 'match_end'
  AND {epoch_to_ts:event_timestamp} >= {time_window:30}
